title: Recipe selector polish
summary: Tighten recipe selection and composition rules as more static app recipes are added.
nextStep: Add a regression config whenever a selector rule changes.

title: Local-first board persistence
summary: Let users change local card status in the browser without writing to a server or repo.
nextStep: Store user-side board overrides in localStorage with a reset control.

title: Static intelligence index
summary: Generate precomputed indexes that make large static sites feel queryable and alive.
nextStep: Prototype a JSON search index from recipe and artifact metadata.

title: Agent maintenance cadence
summary: Define when autonomous agents may propose or apply changes without creating notification noise.
nextStep: Approve a quiet schedule and escalation rules before enabling recurring runs.
